Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.notification

Class Notifier<T>

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.notification.Notifier<T>
public class Notifier<T> extends Object
A notifier class genericised on the class of object that will be sent to Listeners. This is a simpler, more flexible, and more type-safe form of the Observer pattern than the one provided via the standard Java Observer/Observable framework. A good candidate for T is an enum. Notice that both notifier and listener must share the same type T.

    Description
    void
    addListener(Listener<T> listener)
    Add a listener with no immediate notification message.
    void
    addListener(Listener<T> listener, boolean immediateMessages)
    Add a listener, and specify whether to notify it immediately.
    void
    cleanup()
    Remove all listeners that are willing to be removed.
    void
    notifyListeners(T message)
    Notify all listeners of an activity update and collect the message for future replay, in particular for new listeners.
    void
    removeListenerIfWilling(Listener<T> listener)
    Remove a listener, if it says it is willing to be removed.

  • Method Details

    • addListener

      public void addListener(Listener<T> listener)
      Add a listener with no immediate notification message.
      Parameters:
      listener - The listener to add.

    • addListener

      public void addListener(Listener<T> listener, boolean immediateMessages)
      Add a listener, and specify whether to notify it immediately.
      Parameters:
      listener - The listener to add.
      immediateMessages - Send all messages so far to this new listener.

    • removeListenerIfWilling

      public void removeListenerIfWilling(Listener<T> listener)
      Remove a listener, if it says it is willing to be removed.
      Parameters:
      listener - The listener to remove.

    • cleanup

      public void cleanup()
      Remove all listeners that are willing to be removed. Also, clear the message list.

    • notifyListeners

      public void notifyListeners(T message)
      Notify all listeners of an activity update and collect the message for future replay, in particular for new listeners.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to pass to each listener.
